rows.description: Line items for the invoice (handled implicitly by template loop).

totals.description: Aggregated financial totals (handled as scalars in this schema).

semantics: Scalars represent the single-row summary of the invoice. Row tokens are empty in this schema, implying the HTML template handles row iteration separately or the data is pre-joined. Totals are treated as scalar values for the specific invoice instance.
transformations: Format issue_date and due_date to DD-MM-YYYY HH:MM:SS.
Format all currency fields to 2 decimal places.
Calculate final_balance as grand_total minus payment_made.
Map payment_made to the sum of payments.amount_paid for the invoice.
